raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Anaffus bija diwipa- /
definits Gaddus wezz/ /
tad tas par Kehniu tu/
tappe/ un waldija peezdefinits /
un peezus Gaddus Jerusaleme. /
Un winna Mahtei bija Ewziba /
Wahrda.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch darrija/ kas tam /
KUNGAM ne patikke / pehz to /
Paganu Negantibahm/ ko tas /
KUNGS to Israêta Behrnu /
Preekfcha bij isdsinnis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo tas ustattiia atkaſ tohs /
Augstums/ ko winna Tehws /
Istius bij isnihzinajs/ un ustai- /
fija Bâalam Altarus/ un darri- /
ja weenn Elka Meschu/ ittin ka /
Akabs tas Israêta kehntisch bij /
darrijs / un klannijahs preekfchb /
wifnu Debbes Spehku/ un kal- /
poja teem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Wiꞥſch darrija arridsan /
Altarus ta KUNGA Namnâ/ /
no ka tas KUNGS fazzijs irr: /
Jerusaleme gribbu es fawu /
Wahrdu lift.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Wiꞥſch ustaifija arridsan/ /
Altarus wiffam Debbes Speh- /
kam/ eekſch abbejeim Pagalineem /
ta KUNGA Namna.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Wiꞥſch likke arridsan /
wu Dehlu zaur Uggunt eet/ /
eezeentja Putnu Brehkichanu /
Sihnes/ un peetturreja Sihne /
kus un Sihnes Zeenitajus/ /
darrija dauds fauna preeffch /
KUNGA Azzim/ winnu apta /
tinadams.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Wiꞥſch likke arridsan we /
nu Elka Mescha Bildi/ ko wiꞥſ /
bij darrijs tai Namnâ/ no /
tas KUNGS us Dahwidu /
winna Dehlu Salamann bij ta /
zijs: Schai Namnâ un Jer /
saleme/ ko es no wiſahm Isr /
eta Ziltim tsredsejs/ likichu es /
wu Wahrdiu mubschigt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un es ne liſschu wairs /
fraêta Kahju kusteht no ta /
Semmes/ ko es winnu Te /
weem efimu dewis/ tomehr t /
ja tee turr un darr wifju/ ko /
teem efimu pawehlejs / un pe /
wiffas Banslibas/ ko ma /
Kalps Mohsus teem pawehlejs
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet tee ne klaufija/ jo M /
naffus darrija tohs maldiht/ /
tee jo nikui darrija / ne ka /
Pagani/ ko tas KUNGS /
Israêta Behrnu Preekfcha /
isdeldejs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad runnaja tas KUNG /
zaur faweem Kalpeim teem Pu /
weefheem/ un fazzija:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tapehz/ ka Manaſſ /
tas Kehniach no Juhda fcha /
Negantibas irr darrijs/ nifn /
darridams pahr wifju/ ko tee /
moriteri irr darrijchi/kas preek /
winnu biſchi/ uu irr Juhou /
rids
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
